I highly suggest scheduling a brief telehealth follow-up with Dr. Maliha Rahman to review your current protocol.

title: Scheduled: Daily 5-Minute Wellness Check

details.biometric_context: Stable day. No stress spikes detected. Active windows predominantly Slack and Reddit.
details.agent_message: Good afternoon. It's time for your scheduled daily wellness check to calibrate today's RAG report. Please find 5 minutes of time and start this chat for your wellness.

title: Triage Session: Routine Baseline Evaluation
description: Live Featherless DeepSeek-V3 evaluation for daily cognitive journaling.

chat_log.message: Welcome to your daily wellness check. I've been monitoring your telemetry, and your metrics have been incredibly stable today with zero stress spikes. I see you've mostly been alternating between Slack and Reddit. How is your energy holding up?
Energy is actually really good today. Just catching up on some Slack threads for work and took a short break on Reddit a bit ago to clear my head.
Excellent. Your Beta/Theta ratio confirms a healthy baseline, and your focus recovery after your Reddit break was optimal. Are you experiencing any physical tension or eye strain?
Nope, feeling fine. I got up to stretch and grab some water right before this.

Perfect. You are operating exactly within your ideal cognitive parameters. I'll log this as a highly stable, productive day in your cognitive journal. No adjustments to your schedule or clinical alerts are needed. Keep up the good pace. Ending session.
